titleStmt.title: SII 19.373: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 373. (A.R. No. 366 of 1917.) TIRUVĀṆḌĀRKŌYIL, PONDYCHERY STATE. ON THE SOUTH WILL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, PAÑCHANADĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is probably a record of Uttama-Chōḷa's reign. It is damaged in places and is also incomplete. It seems to record the grant, to one Piḷḷai Sadāśivaṉ Nārāyaṇa-Bhaṭṭaṉ of Kiḷimāḍam in Iḍaiyāṟṟukkuḍi, of one share in the right of worship (with its appurtenance in land but excluding the house) in the temple of Tiruvārainakkankōyil-Paramasvāmi at Tribhuvanamahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Āramūr Ōramma[n] Ādittaṉ Śaṅkaraṉ of Nārāyaṇachchēri, a member of the āḷungaṇam after purchasing two shares out of the eight (ashṭakam) accompanying the obligation (śāsana bandha) from Vīrasvāmi-Sōmāśiyār of Iḍaiyāṟṟukkuḍi residing at Irushikēśavachchēri (quarter) of the village, who had been the owner of three shares in addition to two by purchase and inheritence from his jñātis.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī ..kopparakecaripanmarkki yāṇṭu 10 5- Āva
tu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrītribhuvanamahādevicatu
[rvvedimaṅkalam] yāḷuṅkaṇattāruḷ śrīnārāyaṇacceri
Āramur Orammannāṉa Ātittaṉ caṅkaran
ku yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu Uttarāyanam paṟṟina saṅkraāntināḷ Ā
ṭaiyārnāṭṭu brahmadeyam tiruṉaḷāṟu parameśvarapa
ṭṭārakar koyilile vaytu Iṭaiyāṟṟukkuṭi kiḷimāṭat
tupiḷḷai satāśivaṉ nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaṉ kaiyile triri
bhuvannamahādeviścaturvetimaṅkalattu tiruvāṟai
nakkaṉ koyil paramasvāmikaḷukku manai ṉiṅkalāka
Ivūr Oru paṅkum niroṭu Aṭṭikkuṭutteṉ Ikkuṭutta
paṅkāvatu Ivūr Iruṣigecavacceri Iṭaiyāṟṟukku
ṭi virasvāmiccomāciyār Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṣṭakattu Ivvirasvā
micomāciyār śāsānabaddarāka paṭaittuṭaiya paṅko
ṉṟum Ivarey Ivvaṣṭakattu śāsanabaddha marutūr pālāciriya
ṉ nakkaṉ Ātittaṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiya paṅ
koṉṟum Ivvaṣṭakattu śāsanabaddham koṭṭaiyū
rc cāvān=ti kokai koṟṟaṉpakkal vilaikoṇ
ṭuṭaiya paṅkoṉṟum Āka Immūṉṟu paṅkilu
m Ivaruṭaiya ñāti pacuvati tāmotirapaṭṭa
num Ivaṉ tampi paśupati virattevar pakkal
kūṟupeṟṟuṭaiya mukkāl paṅkum Ivaṉ tampi
ṉakam paśupati tāmotirapaṭṭaṉ ceyakaṉ muk
kāṟpaṅkum paraśurāmasomayājiyār Asyavṛddhiyil
Ivar makaṉ viraṉ Ātittanoṭu pava(t)tāmoti
rapaṭṭaṉ kūṟupeṟṟuuṭaiyaṉ Āyamaṉpakkal paṅkum
Āka Irupaṅkiṉvaḻi vanta nilattu vilai
Digital edition of SII 19.373 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
